optimization_backlog.name: raise-inline-budget-85
optimization_backlog.desc: Raise inlineMaxBudget from 80 to 85. BTree.Get (cost 81) and findGeneration (cost 81) are NOT inlined despite relaxed mode allowing them - score adjustment demotes them. A 80->85 base budget makes them unconditionally inlineable. Also captures BTree.Clear (cost 85).
optimization_backlog.risk: low-medium - small budget increase, may inline a few more functions globally
optimization_backlog.analysis: BTree.Get cost=81 (1 over), findGeneration cost=81 (1 over). Relaxed mode marks them 'can inline' but they're NOT actually inlined at call sites due to score demotion. node.mutableChild cost=86 also captured at budget=85+relaxed.

optimization_backlog.name: bce-key-index
optimization_backlog.desc: Only 3 BCE found in testutil/hash.go. Main key_index.go hot paths have minimal BCE opportunities in go1.26. Lower priority than inlining.

optimization_backlog.name: escape-keyindex-put
optimization_backlog.desc: keyIndex.put has append() escaping to heap for generations and revs slices. Improving escape analysis for append patterns could reduce GC pressure.
optimization_backlog.risk: medium-high - escape analysis changes are delicate

key_findings: BTree.Get cost=81 vs budget=80: NOT inlined despite relaxed mode (score demotion)
findGeneration cost=81 vs budget=80: NOT inlined despite relaxed mode
items.find cost=119: inlined in some contexts via generics specialization
node.mutableChild cost=86: not inlined, affects Put path
node.get cost=167: too expensive even for relaxed budget (160)
key_index.go escape: append in put() escapes generations/revs to heap
BCE: only 3 bounds checks found in testutil, main hot paths well-optimized

task_substitutions: Tasks 3,1,8 selected. Task 1 re-ran (side compiler rebuilt from scratch since ephemeral). Task 3 completed with refined analysis.
